context_text:
[1] Wikidata Query Service
Wikidata Query Service. Category: knowledge_graph. Base URL: https://query.wikidata.org/sparql. Auth: none. Best for: entity graph traversal, facts, linked-data joins. Constraints: SPARQL endpoint fair-use expectations.
Source: https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Wikidata_Query_Service/User_Manual

[2] Dataverse Native API
Dataverse Native API. Category: datasets. Base URL: https://dataverse.harvard.edu/api. Auth: token optional by endpoint. Best for: dataset metadata, files, collection traversal. Constraints: Dataverse installation policy.
Source: https://guides.dataverse.org/en/latest/api/native-api.html

[3] NVD Vulnerabilities API
NVD Vulnerabilities API. Category: security. Base URL: https://services.nvd.nist.gov/rest/json/cves/2.0. Auth: none (API key optional). Best for: CVE ingestion, security governance, risk intelligence. Constraints: pagination and request limits.
Source: https://nvd.nist.gov/developers/vulnerabilities

[4] arXiv API
arXiv API. Category: academic. Base URL: https://export.arxiv.org/api/query. Auth: none. Best for: preprints, paper metadata, topic discovery. Constraints: 3-second polite delay between requests.
Source: https://info.arxiv.org/help/api/user-manual.html

[5] arXiv OAI-PMH
arXiv OAI-PMH. Category: academic. Base URL: https://export.arxiv.org/oai2. Auth: none. Best for: bulk metadata harvesting. Constraints: OAI-PMH harvest semantics.
Source: https://info.arxiv.org/help/oa/index.html

usage.intent: small active context, large retrieval memory
